name: Promotion bound to the persistent loyalty campaign
description: SFCC OCAPI Data API response to PUT .../campaigns/Salesforce-Loyalty-Campaign/promotions/SFloyalty-20OFFLEGO. Rather than a campaign per promotion, all loyalty PMIDs + customer groups bind to ONE persistent, always-on campaign. The Middleware makes two such binds per promotion (promotion assignment + customer-group assignment).
notes: The companion call binds the customer group: PUT .../campaigns/Salesforce-Loyalty-Campaign/customer_groups/CG-SFloyalty-20OFFLEGO (response _type: campaign_customer_group_assignment, same shape with customer_group_id). One indefinite campaign keeps the object count flat; per-promotion activation is entirely driven by the session attribute + dynamic group, not by campaign scheduling.
